title: A2A Delegation Envelope
description: Contract 3 — A2A delegation envelope. DEFINED NOW for alignment; ENFORCEMENT TURNS ON in Phase 10 (Component 2b: operational rules, cycle detection, transitive matrix, audit pipeline; issuance side in Phase 2 Component 8d). This envelope is carried in the Bearer JWT claims (Contract 1 reserved optional), NOT in the A2A message body — the body is data, the JWT is authority. Receivers run the validation cascade (sig verify, chain continuity, expiry bounding, monotone scope non-increase, terminal-receiver match, root-not-expired, action-in-scope, cycle check) before honouring a delegated task. Forward-compatible: tolerates unknown fields.

delegation_chain.description: Ordered chain of signed delegation hops from root to current receiver.

from.description: Agent-id of the delegating (sending) agent for this hop.

to.description: Agent-id of the receiving agent for this hop. For i>0, chain[i-1].to MUST equal chain[i].from.

scopes.description: Scopes granted on this hop, e.g. ["llm:invoke", "tool:invoke"]. For i>0 MUST be a subset of chain[i-1].scopes (monotone non-increasing).

issued_at.description: Unix epoch seconds when this hop was issued.

expires_at.description: Unix epoch seconds when this hop expires. MUST be <= delegation_root_expiry.

transitive.description: Whether the receiver may further delegate without being the root.

kid.description: Auth signing key id; sig MUST verify against the JWKS entry referenced by this kid.

sig.description: base64 RS256 signature over canonical-json(entry minus sig).

delegation_depth.description: Current chain depth. Issuance requires delegation_depth + 1 <= MAX_DELEGATION_DEPTH (default 5, per-tenant override allowed).

delegation_root_task.description: Root workflow task UUID; carried verbatim through every hop.

delegation_root_expiry.description: Unix epoch seconds when the root authority expires; no link may extend it. Carried verbatim through every hop.
